message:
feat(cli/recommend): add preference filters for personalized recommendations

Extends the recommend command with filtering options to let users
express their preferences and exclusions:

New options:
- --prefer-tags <tags>: Boost prompts matching these tags (comma-separated)
- --prefer-categories <cats>: Boost prompts in these categories
- --exclude-tags <tags>: Remove prompts with these tags from results
- --exclude-categories <cats>: Remove prompts in these categories

Implementation details:
- parseList() helper splits comma-separated values into clean arrays
- buildPreferences() constructs RecommendationPreferences from options
- Preferences flow through to getForYouRecommendations() core function
- When seed prompt provided, preference filters are ignored (with warning)
- JSON output includes preferences object when any filters are active

CLI registration:
- Added four new options to recommend command in index.ts
- Updated help.ts with expanded options list and new examples

The preference system enables workflows like:
  jfp recommend --prefer-tags automation,devops --exclude-categories marketing

This filters the for-you algorithm to weight matches based on user's
stated preferences, useful for domain-specific prompt discovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -154,6 +154,10 @@ cli
 cli
   .command("recommend [id]", "Personalized recommendations (Premium)")
   .option("--limit <n>", "Max recommendations (default: 5)")
+  .option("--prefer-tags <tags>", "Boost recommendations for tags (comma-separated)")
+  .option("--prefer-categories <categories>", "Boost recommendations for categories (comma-separated)")
+  .option("--exclude-tags <tags>", "Exclude tags from recommendations (comma-separated)")
+  .option("--exclude-categories <categories>", "Exclude categories from recommendations (comma-separated)")
   .option("--json", "Output JSON")
   .action(recommendCommand);
